diseases.name: Acute Coronary Syndrome
diseases.description: A condition where the blood flow to the heart is blocked, causing chest pain and nausea.
recommendations: Chew an aspirin if prescribed by a doctor
Stay calm and still until help arrives

diseases.name: Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease (GERD)
diseases.description: A condition where stomach acid flows back into the esophagus, causing chest pain and nausea.
recommendations: Elevate the head of the bed

result.general_advice: If you are experiencing severe chest pain or difficulty breathing, call emergency services immediately. For mild symptoms, try to manage stress, eat smaller meals, and avoid lying down after eating.
result.disclaimer: This is not a substitute for professional medical advice.

diseases.name: Common Cold
diseases.description: A viral infection that affects the upper respiratory system, causing symptoms like cough and fatigue.
recommendations: use a humidifier to relieve cough
take over-the-counter pain relievers like acetaminophen

diseases.name: Influenza
diseases.description: A contagious respiratory illness caused by the influenza virus, which can lead to fatigue, cough, and other symptoms.
recommendations: stay hydrated by drinking plenty of fluids
consider taking antiviral medications like oseltamivir

result.general_advice: If your symptoms worsen or you experience difficulty breathing, chest pain, or a fever over 102°F, seek medical attention. Otherwise, focus on managing your symptoms and supporting your immune system through a balanced diet, adequate sleep, and good hygiene practices.
result.disclaimer: This is not a substitute for professional medical advice.
